title: Touw River a sight to behold
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - Following rainfall of 180mm plus recorded in just 24 hours in the Buffelskop catchment area of the Touw River, by this morning, Tuesday 9 April, the massive volume of water had pushed the river mouth in Wilderness completely open with the river cascading into the ocean.


> Jeff Ayliffe of Group Editors Live was on the scene.


BEFORE: See photographs below of the Touw river mouth before the rain - a man (or SANParks) made swimming pool.

And after....


> VIDEO: Wilderness river mouth burst: Massive flooding after 180mm rainfall in 24 hours


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
